18.17: Fam la dir ar Pier, “Eski twa osi to pa enn disip sa boug la?” Li reponn, “Mwa? Non.”
18.18: Bann serviter ek bann gard ti pe debout. Zot finn alim enn dife parski ti pe fer fre. Pier ti la ar zot e li osi ti pe sof dife.
18.19: Alors gran pret poz Zezi kestion lor so bann disip e lor so lansegnman.
18.20: Zezi reponn li, “Mo finn koz devan tou dimoun lor later; mo finn ansegn toultan dan sinagog e dan tanp, la kot tou bann Zwif rasanble; zame mo finn kasiet pou koze.
18.21: Kifer to poz mwa sa bann kestion la? Al demann bann dimoun ki finn vinn ekout mwa; zot va dir twa ki mo finn dir zot; zot konn bien seki mo finn dir.”
18.22: Letan bannla tann sa parol la, enn gard ki ti la donn Zezi enn kalot. Li dir Zezi, “Enn manier pou koz ar gran pret sa?”
18.23: Zezi reponn li, “Si mo koze pa bon, montre mwa seki pa bon me si mo koze bon, ki fer to bat mwa?”
18.24: Alors Ann avoy Zezi devan Kaif ki ti gran pret. Zezi ti touzour atase.
18.25: Letan sa, Simon Pier ti pe debout e li ti pe sof dife. Bannla demann li, “Eski twa osi to pa enn so bann disip?” Li renie Zezi e li dir, “Mwa? Non.”
18.26: Enn serviter gran pret, fami boug ki Pier ti koup so zorey la, dir, “Eski mo pa finn trouv twa dan zardin avek li?”
18.27: Ankor enn fwa, Pier renie. Lerla mem kok sante.
18.28: Boner gramatin, zot pran Zezi kot Kaif e zot amenn li devan pale gouverner. Zot pa rant dan pale pouki zot pa vinn inpir e pouki zot kapav manz repa Paskal.
18.29: Akoz samem Pilat sorti deor e vinn get zot. Li demande, “Ki sarz zot ena kont sa boug la?”
18.30: Zot dir, “Nou pa ti pou amenn li devan twa, si li pa ti enn malfeter.”
18.31: Pilat reponn, “Pran li zotmem, ziz li dapre zot lalwa.” Bann Zwif dir, “Dapre nou lalwa nou pa gagn drwat tir lavi dimoun.”
18.32: Lerla parol Zezi realize kan li ti pe dir ki manier li ti pou mor.
18.33: Ankor enn fwa, Pilat rant dan so pale, li apel Zezi e li dir, “Eski to lerwa Zwif, twa?”
18.34: Zezi reponn, “Seki to pe dir lor mwa, eski to pe dir sa par to prop lide ou bien lot dimoun finn dir twa?”
18.35: Pilat dir, “Eski mo enn Zwif mwa? To prop dimoun ek bann gran pret finn livre twa ar mwa; ki to finn fer koumsa?”
18.36: Zezi reponn, “Mo Rwayom pa lor later; si mo Rwayom ti lor later, mo bann gard ti pou lager pou mwa, pouki bannla pa livre mwa ar bann Zwif. Me vremem, mo Rwayom pa la isi.”
18.37: Lerla Pilat dir, “Alors to enn lerwa?” Zezi reponn, “Twa ki pe dir. Mo finn ne, mo finn vinn dan lemonn pou enn sel rezon: rann temwagnaz laverite. Tou dimoun ki dan laverite, ekout mo lavwa.”
18.38: Pilat demann Zezi, “Ki ete laverite?” Apre sa dialog la, Pilat sorti deor ankor enn fwa; li al get bann Zwif e li dir zot, “Mo pa trouv okenn rezon pou kondann li.
18.39: Dapre zot koutim, mo abitie larg enn prizonie pou Pak; eski zot oule mo larg lerwa Zwif?”
18.40: Zot tou kriye, “Non, pa li! Larg Barabas.” Barabas la ti enn bandi.

19.1: Apre sa Pilat pran Zezi e li donn lord pou fwet li.
19.2: Bann solda tres enn kouronn pikan e fons sa lor so latet; zot met enn manto rouz fonse lor li.
19.3: Zot vinn devan li e zot salye li, “Me respe lerwa Zwif!” Lerla zot donn li kalot.
19.4: Pilat sorti deor ankor enn fwa e li dir bannla, “Gete, mo amenn li devan zot pouki zot kone ki mo pa trouv nanye de mal ar li.”
19.5: Lerla Zezi vinn deor avek so kouronn pikan lor so latet ek so manto rouz fonse lor li. Pilat dir zot, “Ala zom la.”
19.6: Kan bann gran pret ek bann gard trouv li, zot kriye bien-bien for, “Krisifie li, krisifie li.” Pilat dir, “Pran li, krisifie li zotmem parski mwa, mo pa trouv okenn rezon fer sa.”
19.7: Bann Zwif reponn, “Nou ena enn lalwa e dapre sa lalwa la, li bizin mor parski li deklar li Garson Bondie.”
19.8: Ler Pilat tann sa bann parol la, li gagn plis per ankor.
19.9: Li rerant dan so pale e li demann Zezi, “Kot to sorti?” Me Zezi pa reponn.
19.10: Lerla Pilat dir, “To pale reponn mwa? To pa kone mo ena pouvwar pou larg twa ek pouvwar pou krisifie twa?”
19.11: Zezi reponn, “To pena pouvwar lor mwa exsepte seki to finn resevwar depi lao. Akoz samem sa dimoun ki finn livre mwa la, so pese pli gran ki pou twa.”
19.12: Lerla Pilat ti pe rod tou mwayin pou larg li me bann Zwif kontigne kriye e zot dir, “Si to larg li, to pa kamarad lanperer; dimoun ki deklar li lerwa pe kont lanperer.”
19.13: Letan Pilat finn tann sa bann parol la, li amenn Zezi deor. Pilat asiz dan fotey kot ziz rann zizman, dan enn landrwa ki ti apel ‘Pavaz’ ki vedir ‘Gabata’ an Ebre.
19.14: Ti lavey Pak e ti pre pou midi. Pilat dir ar bann Zwif, “Ala zot lerwa.”
19.15: Me zot tou kriye, “Touy li, koulout li lor lakrwa.” Pilat dir zot, “Eski mo pou krisifie zot lerwa?” Bann gran pret reponn, “Nou pena lot lerwa apart lanperer.”
19.16: Alors Pilat livre Zezi pouki bannla krisifie li. Zot pran Zezi.
19.17: Li sorti, li ale e limem sarye so lakrwa; li ariv dan enn landrwa ki ti apel ‘Krann’, an Ebre: Golgota.
19.18: Zot krisifie li lamem; ti ena de lot dimoun avek li, enn sak kote, Zezi dan milie.
19.19: Pilat finn ekrir lor enn plak pou met lor lakrwa, “Zezi Nazaret Lerwa Zwif.”
19.20: Boukou Zwif finn lir plak la parski Zezi finn krisifie pre ar lavil; ti ekrir li an Ebre, Latin ek Grek.
19.21: Bann gran pret dir Pilat, “Pa ekrir, ‘Lerwa Zwif’, me ‘Li finn dir mo lerwa Zwif’.”
19.22: Pilat reponn, “Seki mo finn ekrir, mo finn ekrir.”
19.23: Kan bann solda inn fini krisifie Zezi, zot pran so manto, zot diviz li an-kat e sak solda gagn enn par. Zot inn pran osi so rob ki ti fer avek enn sel bout latwal, san okenn koutir.
19.24: Zot dir ant zot, “Pa bizin desir so rob me anou fer enn tiraz osor, seki gagne, pran li.” Tou sa la finn pase pouki sa parol Lekritir la realize, ‘Zot finn partaz mo manto ant zot Zot finn fer enn tiraz osor lor mo linz.’ Ala seki bann solda inn fer.
19.25: Kot lakrwa Zezi, ti ena so mama, ser so mama, Marie, fam Klopa ek Marie Madlenn ki ti pe debout.
19.26: Letan Zezi trouv so mama ek pre ar li, disip ki li ti kontan la, li dir ar so mama, “Fam, ala to garson.”
19.27: Apre li dir ar disip la, “Ala to mama.” Depi sa, disip la pran so mama kot li.
19.28: Apre tousala, letan Zezi trouve ki tou asterla finn akonpli, e pouki Lekritir realiz ziska dan bout, li dir, “Mo swaf.”
19.29: Ti ena la enn bol plin ar vineg; alors bann solda met enn leponz dan vineg, zot fons leponz la dan enn bout baton e zot met li kot labous Zezi.
19.30: Zezi pran vineg la, apre li dir, “Tou inn fini.” Li bes so latet e li rann so dernie soupir.
19.31: Kouma ti zour preparasion avan Pak, bann Zwif pa ti oule ki bann lekor res lor lakrwa zour saba, (parski sa saba la ti enn zour espesial); alors zot demann Pilat, kas lipie bannla pouki kapav desann zot.
19.32: Bann solda vini. Zot kas lipie premie boug la, answit deziem la, e
19.33: kan zot vinn devan Zezi, zot konstate ki li finn fini mor. Alors zot pa kas so lipie.
19.34: Enn parmi bann solda pik so lans dan kot Zezi; lerla disan ek dilo koule.
19.35: Dimoun ki finn trouv sa pe donn so temwagnaz pouki zot osi, zot kapav krwar; li kone ki li pe dir laverite.
19.36: Tousala finn arive pouki Lekritir realize, “Pa pou kas okenn so lezo.”
19.37: Enn lot pasaz dir ankor, “Zot pou fixe zot regar lor Sa-Enn ki zot finn transperse la.”
19.38: Apre sa, Zozef ki sorti Arimate, demann Pilat si li kapav pran lekor Zezi. (Zozef finn swiv Zezi me san ki personn kone, parski li ti gagn per bann Zwif). Pilat donn li permision pran so lekor. Alors li ale e li pran lekor Zezi.
19.39: Nikodem, ki ti vinn zwenn Zezi dan nwar premie fwa ki li ti vinn get li, finn amenn enn melanz lamir ek lalwes, anviron san liv pou anbom so lekor.
19.40: Zot pran lekor Zezi, zot anvlop li avek bann bandaz an lin; dan sa bandaz la zot met melanz la dapre koutim Zwif kan met enn lekor dan tonbo.
19.41: Dan landrwa kot Zezi ti krisifie, ti ena enn zardin e dan sa zardin la, ti ena enn nouvo tonbo ki pa ti ankor servi.
19.42: Kouma ti lavey saba e ki tonbo la ti pre, zot met Zezi ladan.

20.1: Premie zour lasemenn, boner gramatin kan ti ankor fer nwar, Marie Madlenn al dan tonbo e li konstate ki ros ki ti devan lantre tonbo, finn avanse.
20.2: Lerla li galoupe, li al get Simon Pier e lot disip ki Zezi ti kontan la e li dir zot, “Zot finn kokin Lesegner dan tonbo e nou pa kone kot zot finn al met li.”
20.3: Lerla Pier ek lot disip la sorti pou al dan tonbo.
20.4: Toulede galoupe ale me lot disip la galoup pli vit ki Pier e li ariv avan li dan tonbo.
20.5: Li bese pou gete e li trouv bann bandaz an lin anba me li pa rantre.
20.6: Ler Simon Pier, ki ti pe vinn deryer li, arive, li rant dan tonbo e li trouv bann bandaz an lin.
20.7: Linz ki ti servi pou rekouver so latet, ti nepli avek bann bandaz me finn anroule apar dan enn lot plas.
20.8: Apre sa, lot disip ki finn ariv premie dan tonbo, rantre li osi. Ler li trouve, li krwar.
20.9: Tou sa letan la, zot pa finn konpran ki li ti bizin resisite parmi bann mor parey kouma finn ekrir dan liv.
20.10: Apre sa, bann disip la retourn kot zot.
20.11: Marie ti pe asize deor, pre ar tonbo e li ti pe plore. Letan li ti pe plore, li bese pou get dan tonbo.
20.12: Li trouv de anz abiye anblan ki ti pe asize; zot ti la, kot ti met lekor Zezi, enn kot latet, lot kot lipie.
20.13: Zot dir, “Fam, ki fer to pe plore?” Li dir zot, “Zot finn kokin mo Segner e mo pa kone kot zot finn al met li.”
20.14: Letan li finn fini dir sa, li vir deryer e li trouv Zezi ki ti pe debout, me li pa ti rekonet li.
20.15: Zezi dir li, “Fam, ki fer to pe plore? Kisannla to pe rode?” Li ti krwar zardinie e li dir, “Misie, si twa ki finn pran li, dir mwa kot to finn met li, mo pou al sers li.”
20.16: Zezi dir, “Marie.” Marie vire e dir an Ebre, “Rabouni!” (Seki vedir Met).
20.17: Zezi dir, “Pa tous mwa, parski mo pankor mont kot mo Papa. Al kot mo bann frer e dir zot, ‘Mo pe al kot mo Papa ek zot Papa, kot mo Bondie ek zot Bondie.’ ”
20.18: Marie Madlenn sorti e al anons bann disip, “Mo finn trouv Lesegner!” E li rakont zot seki Zezi finn dir.
20.19: Aswar premie zour lasemenn, bann disip ti ansam dan enn lakaz. Zot inn met lakle dan laport parski zot ti gagn per bann Zwif. Zezi vini, li debout devan zot e li dir, “Shalom”.
20.20: Kan li fini salye zot, li montre zot so lame ek so kot. Bann disip ti dan enn gran lazwa kan zot finn trouv Lesegner.
20.21: Zezi dir zot ankor, “Lape avek zot; parey kouma mo Papa finn avoy mwa, mo osi mo avoy zot.”
20.22: Apre sa, Zezi soufle lor zot e dir zot, “Ala Lespri Sin.
20.23: Si zot pardonn pese dimoun, pese la pou pardone, si zot tini pese dimoun, pese la pou tini.”
20.24: Toma, enn parmi Ledouz, (so nom gate Didim, ki vedir Zimo), pa ti avek zot kan Zezi ti vini.
20.25: Bann lezot disip inn dir li, “Nou finn trouv Lesegner.” Me li dir zot, “Si mo pa trouv ar mo lizie bann mark koulou dan so lame, si mo pa met mo ledwa dan so ple e si mo pa met mo lame dan so kot, mo pa pou krwar.”
20.26: Wit zour apre, bann disip ti ansam dan lakaz e Toma ti avek zot. Ti ena lakle dan laport e Zezi vini, li debout devan zot e li dir, “Shalom.”
20.27: Apre li dir ar Toma, “Met to le dwa isi, ala mo lame; pran to lame, met li dan mo kot. Pa doute me krwar.”
20.29: Zezi dir, “Akoz to trouve, to finn krwar? Bienere seki krwar san trouve.”
20.30: Zezi finn fer devan so bann disip boukou lot sign ki pa finn ekrir dan sa liv la.
20.31: Tousala finn ekrir pouki zot krwar ki Zezi-mem Lekris, Garson Bondie e pouki bann seki krwar gagn lavi par so nom.

21.1: Apre sa, Zezi re-aparet devan so bann disip dan borlamer Tiberiad. Ala kouma sa finn pase.
21.2: Ti ena Simon Pier, Toma, (so nom gate Didim), Natanael (limem sorti Kana, enn vilaz dan Galile), de garson Zebede ek de disip ankor.
21.3: Simon Pier dir zot, “Mo pe al lapes.” Zot dir li, “Nou osi, nou vinn ar twa.” Zot mont lor bato, zot ale, enn nwit zot pa may nanye.
21.4: Kan lizour ti pe koumans paret, Zezi ti pe debout dan bor dilo, me bann disip pa ti kone si li sa.
21.5: Zezi dir zot, “Mo bann zanfan, pena pwason?” Zot reponn li, “Non, pena.”
21.6: Li dir zot, “Zet zot file kote drwat zot pou trouve.” Lerla zot zete. Telman file ti ranpli ar pwason ki zot ti nepli ena lafors pou ris li.
21.7: Disip ki Zezi ti kontan la dir Pier, “Lesegner sa.” Letan Simon Pier tande ki ti Lesegner sa, li pas so linz lor li, parski li ti touni, e li zete, li naze.
21.8: Lezot disip vinn ater dan bato. Kouma zot pa ti lwin ar laplaz, apepre san met, zot ris zot file ranpli ar pwason deryer zot.
21.9: Letan zot finn fini desann ater, zot trouv enn ti dife; lor dife la pwason ti pe griye e ti ena dipin osi.
21.10: Zezi dir zot, “Amenn inpe pwason ki zot finn lapes zordi.”
21.11: Lerla Simon Pier mont lor bato e li ris ater file ki ti ranpli ar gro-gro pwason. Ti ena san sinkann-trwa e zot tou tini dan file la san ki li defonse.
21.12: Zezi dir zot, “Vinn manze.” Personn parmi bann disip pa oze demann li, “Ki to ete?” Zot ti kone se Lesegner.
21.13: Zezi vini, pran dipin e donn zot e li fer parey ar pwason.
21.14: Sa fer trwaziem fwa ki Zezi aparet ar so bann disip depi ki li finn resisite parmi lemor.
21.15: Kan zot finn fini manze, Zezi demann Simon Pier, “Simon garson Zan eski to kontan mwa plis ki bannla kontan mwa?” Li reponn, “Wi Segner, to kone ki mo kontan twa.” Zezi dir li, “Donn mo bann timouton manze.”
21.16: Li demann li enn deziem fwa, “Simon garson Zan, eski to kontan mwa?” Simon reponn li, “Wi Segner, to kone mo kontan twa.” Zezi dir li, “Pran swin mo bann brebi.”
21.17: Zezi demann li enn trwaziem fwa, “Simon garson Zan, eski to kontan mwa?” Pier sagrin ki Zezi demann li enn trwaziem fwa, “Eski to kontan mwa?” Lerla Pier reponn, “Segner, to konn tou, to kone ki mo kontan twa.” Zezi dir li, “Donn manze mo bann mouton.
21.18: Vremem, laverite mo dir twa, kan to ti zenn, to ti met to sang par tomem e to ti al kot to kontan; me kan to pou vinn vie, to pou lev to lame lao e enn lot ki pou atas to sang e pou amenn twa kot to pa anvi ale.”
21.19: (Li finn dir sa pou montre par ki kalite lamor Pier pou glorifie Bondie). Apre sa Zezi dir li, “Swiv mwa.”
21.20: Pier vir deryer e li trouv disip ki Zezi ti kontan. Li ti pe swiv zot. Limem ti met so latet lor lestoma Zezi pandan repa e ti dir, ‘Segner, kisannla pou vann twa?’
21.21: Letan Pier trouv disip la, li dir Zezi, “E li, Segner, ki pou ariv li?”
21.22: Zezi dir li, “Si mo le ki li res ziska mo revini, eski to problem sa? Twa, swiv mwa.”
21.23: Sa parol la finn sirkile parmi bann frer e zot ti krwar ki sa disip la pa pou mor; me Zezi pa ti pe dir ki li pa pou mor me, “Si mo le ki li res ziska mo revini, eski to problem sa?”
21.24: Sa disip la pe donn so temwagnaz lor tousala e limem finn ekrir tou sa e nou kone seki li finn rakonte, li vre.
21.25: Zezi inn fer boukou kiksoz ankor. Si ti ena pou ekrir tousala, mo panse ki lemonn antie pa pou ase gran pou gard tou sa bann liv la.
